summary: A Newsmax remote interview with ICE Deputy Director Madison Sheehan arguing that anti-ICE rhetoric from elected officials endangers agents, with b-roll of Dallas police vehicles. It is a televised news interview, not a produced, music-driven youth-appeal piece.
notable_text: NEWSMAX; 'DEMS, MEDIA SLAM ICE IN LEAD UP TO DALLAS SHOOTING'; 'Madison Sheehan | Deputy Director, ICE'
